{% include "partials/sidebar.html" %}
{% if page.title is present %}

{{ page.title | e }}

{% endif %} {% if page.description is present %}

{{ page.description | e }}

{% endif %}
{{ content }}
{# hwaro exposes no source-file path (page.path, page.file, page.source and friends are all empty), so it is rebuilt from the URL. This template only ever renders leaf pages, which are page bundles: /index.md, or index.ko.md in Korean. Sections use _index.md; see section.html. scripts/check_edit_links.sh asserts every emitted link exists. #} {% set src = page.url | replace(lang_prefix ~ "/", "/") %}
{{ "ui.edit_page" | t }} {% include "partials/prev-next.html" %}
{% include "partials/toc.html" %} {% include "footer.html" %}
